feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to reset approval status of sales order when it's stuck in 'In Approval' and no active work item
entry.content: I need to reset the approval status of a sales order in SAP S/4HANA where the approval status is set to 'In Approval'. The workflow item is not active as the step condition is not met. We have already checked BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE but found no option to reset the approval status. I am looking for an API, function module, or utility that can unlock or reset the approval status in this scenario.

entry.title: Business partner 100231 does not exist in the standard role for role cat. MKK
entry.content:
When creating a sales order using the Domestic Account Group (ZDOM), I receive the following error:

"Business partner 100231 does not exist in the standard role for role category MKK."

However, when I create a sales order using the Foreign Account Group (ZFRN), the sales order is created successfully without any issues.

I have already compared the backend configuration for both account groups, and the configuration appears to be the same. Despite this, the error occurs only for ZDOM.

Could you please help identify what might be causing this issue or advise which additional configuration or master data should be checked?

entry.title: Error : Unknown Account Assignment not defined for use here
entry.content:
Hi, During the creation of Release order with reference to contract using BAPI PO Create1 the error : 'Unknown Account Assignment not defined for use here' is displayed. 

The contract is with AAC ( Account Assignment category) -U. During creation of release order the AAC is changed from U to K and the other mandatory field values GL code and Cost Center is entered. However the error is displayed.

entry.title: Business partner 100231 does not exist in the standard role for role cat. MKK
entry.content:
When creating a sales order using the Domestic Account Group (ZDOM), I receive the following error:

"Business partner 100231 does not exist in the standard role for role category MKK."

However, when I create a sales order using the Foreign Account Group (ZFRN), the sales order is created successfully without any issues.

I have already compared the backend configuration for both account groups, and the configuration appears to be the same. Despite this, the error occurs only for ZDOM.

Could you please help identify what might be causing this issue or advise which additional configuration or master data should be checked?

entry.title: F3697 Gebuchter Betrag weicht vom rechnerischen Betrag ab
entry.content: Interne Leistungsverrechnung wurde erfasst über F3697. Der gebuchte Betrag weicht vom rechnerischen Betrag ab.

entry.title: Define a cost element category for account 5401001005 (controlling area PVM)
entry.content:
We are posting the Manua JV via F-02 t code and  getting error message : 

Define a cost element category for account 5401001005 (controlling area PVM)

Message No. KI280

Diagnosis

Account 5401001005 is a profit and loss account. You assigned it to an object in cost accounting (for example, a cost center, order, project, or profitability segment).

In this case, a cost element category must exist for account 5401001005 in the determined controlling area PVM.
See transaction FS00, "Control Data" area.

 

Procedure

Define a cost element category for account 5401001005 and post again or delete the auxiliary account assignment to objects in cost accounting.

With profitability segment assignment, the error message is only displayed when account-based profitability analysis is activated. Here it may be a good idea to suppress the error message and ignore the account assignment during the posting. This is particularly the case when the posting is not only relevant for the result from the usual busin

entry.title: PO Print Output – Chinese Material Description Showing as ###
entry.content: When printing a Purchase Order, the material description maintained in Chinese language is not displayed correctly. Instead of the Chinese text, the output shows “###”

entry.title: Not able to see transport tab while creating space and pages
entry.content: While creating space and pages in FIORI launchpad we are not able to see transport request tab. Also while adding new tile to a page system is not asking for a Transport.

entry.title: Error KOB1
entry.content:
Hi team,

launching the KOB1 transaction in the background and downloading it to Excel, we noticed that the Excel file does not have the same number of rows as the system (and therefore also the result).

More detail in attachment.

Kind regards

entry.title: Unable to see the Change Log history For QDL2
entry.content: When user want manual change History QDL2 for Audit .unable to see the change log history, could you please help us for this issue.

entry.title: BTE 1820 custom code is not triggering during payment run despite FIBF activation
entry.content: I am implementing a duplicate vendor credit card check under BTE event 1820 with custom code, but the debugger is not stopping, and FIBF activation is in place. The payment run job F110-20260624-TEST0 shows BTE 1820 as active, but my custom code does not seem to be executed during the process.

entry.title: KSII - Maessage KD301
entry.content:
Currently, the client confirms activities in seconds, however the activity types master data are as hours. Regarding the conversion of entries for cost valuation is being converted and valued correctly.

The issue is when we are using the actual activities quantities like base to allocate costs cycles and actual cost rate, the SAP don’t find the activities quantities by hours confirmed to allocation determination.

Cost center CTR 1000/1001100001, cost element 41202001: Tracing factor for splitting is zero

Message No. KD301

Diagnosis

The plan/actual costs for cost element 41202001 cannot be settled to the CO activities for period 5 according to assignment rule MOD in cost center CTR 1000/1001100001 because the tracing factor in plan and in actual is zero.

System Response

The plan/actual costs for cost element 41202001 are split according to the equivalence numbers for the activity types.

Procedure

Check assignment MOD and your splitting rule.

entry.title: Purchase order pricing: ZCOS manual condition proposed with last historical value
entry.content:
When creating a purchase order in ME21N, custom condition type ZCOS is proposed automatically in the item Conditions tab, although ZCOS is expected to be a manual/suggested value that must be reviewed and maintained by the buyer per item.

 

Original business case: PO 4500253085 was created with different ZCOS values by item: item 10 = 37,000, item 20 = 33,000 and item 30 = 35,000. When a new PO was created for the same vendor/material context, the system proposed the last ZCOS value used in the previous PO, i.e. 35,000 from PO 4500253085 item 30.

 

Additional reproduction evidence in ME21N shows the same behavior pattern: after entering ZNAC Standard PO data, supplier 2000003633, purchasing org CA02, purchasing group 101, company code 2002, material MP13000007, quantity 20 KG and plant 2002/CAFEPAC, the Conditions tab is populated with ZCOS (Freight/Quantity) as 55.00 MXN, with a condition value of 3.09 USD.

 

Business expectation: ZCOS is not an automatic tariff/rate and should not be calculated or updated automatically. It should be entered or explicitly confirmed manually per PO item based on the specific commercial conditions applicable to

entry.title: Can be maintain the OBYC table company code wise
entry.content: Can be maintain the OBYC table company code wise  as the accounting is being done based on the company level chart of accounts. can we maintain OBYC table company code wise in sap?

entry.title: DMEE Payment file format
entry.content:
Hello All,

In our S4 HANA SAP System, we are trying to implement pain.001.001.09 payment file format.

We are currently using pain001.001.03 file format with unstructured address field.

Can you please help identify key differences in v 03 and v09 file format and what SAP Notes are required to be implemented for v09 to be available in system.

Thanks

Lekha

entry.title: Cost center & WBS combination is causing error in Process Director
entry.content: When a WBS element is entered at the line-item level, the system displays the error message: "Enter only one true account assignment." We have replicated and tested this issue in the non-production system. Please find the attached test document for reference.

entry.title: Project created from template - Company code not inherited from template (2)
entry.content:
PS project is created from template. Due to the integration with PPM, project template is created as operational project with CJ20N (but not CJ91).

The PS template project used is a multi company project structure (WBS assigned to different company codes within the WBS structure).

When creating an operational project in CJ20N by copy of template project, and changing the project profile, the company code of the template WBS is not copied into the target project, but instead, the company code is inherited from the project definition.  

On the other hand, the profit center is properly inherited from the PS project template. Therefore, the project cannot be saved because of discrepancy betwen profit center inherited from template and company code not inherited from template, but from project definition.

entry.title: Msg 番号 KI235勘定 827130 に CO 対象への割当が必要です
entry.content: 新規会社コードX400の設定に固定資産の原価センターと減価償却費勘定の割り当てを設定たにもかかわらず、Msg 番号 KI235のエラーは発生しました。

entry.title: OA selection during PO creation via Fiori App
entry.content:
While creating Purchase Order via 'Manage Purchase orders' Fiori App (F0842A) --

  1. If Business Partner has multiple OAs assigned in Partner functions and none is marked as default, there is no pop-up in App to select an OA. If we search via F4/value help, there is no filter to identify what all OAs are assigned to main BP.
  2. After OA is manually entered in Purchase Order screen, ‘Supplier Contact Data’ is not dynamically updated with the OA address. It still reflects old address and is updated only after the Purchase Order is saved. Hence, user is unable to validate if the selected address is correct unless they save the PO and view it.

    Is there any way to mitigate above issues and select right OA before saving the PO?

entry.title: Error KOB1
entry.content:
Hi team,

launching the KOB1 transaction in the background and downloading it to Excel, we noticed that the Excel file does not have the same number of rows as the system (and therefore also the result).

More detail in attachment.

Kind regards
